Create personalized landing pages, dynam: Create personalized landing pages, dynamic audio, video, and manage campaigns with Sendr.
\n**How to get your API key:**\n1. Log i:
**How to get your API key:**
1. Log in to your Sendr dashboard at https://app.sendr.io.
2. Go to **Settings > API Keys**.
3. Click **Create New Key**.
4. Copy the key and paste it below.

Need help? Contact Sendr support at https://sendr.io/support
Returns information about the currently: Returns information about the currently connected Sendr API user. Useful for verifying that your API key is valid.
Lists all available contact lists (sheet: Lists all available contact lists (sheets) in your Sendr workspace.
Returns details of a specific contact li: Returns details of a specific contact list (sheet).
Returns all columns (fields) of a contac: Returns all columns (fields) of a contact list, including their enrichment status.
Adds a new contact or record to a select: Adds a new contact or record to a selected contact list (sheet).
Lists all campaigns in your Sendr worksp: Lists all campaigns in your Sendr workspace, optionally filtered by status.
Returns detailed information about a spe: Returns detailed information about a specific campaign.
Lists all available Sendr Page templates: Lists all available Sendr Page templates you can use to create personalized landing pages.
Returns the custom variables (placeholde: Returns the custom variables (placeholders) defined in a selected page template � for example first_name, company, or email.
Creates a personalized Sendr landing pag: Creates a personalized Sendr landing page from a template with custom variables.
Queues a job to generate personalized au: Queues a job to generate personalized audio by replacing a target word in a base audio file.
Queues a job to merge audio and video or: Queues a job to merge audio and video or generate a lipsync video.
Lists all registered webhooks in your Se: Lists all registered webhooks in your Sendr workspace.
Registers a new webhook in Sendr to rece: Registers a new webhook in Sendr to receive event notifications.
Updates an existing Sendr webhook by its: Updates an existing Sendr webhook by its URL.
Deletes a registered Sendr webhook by it: Deletes a registered Sendr webhook by its URL.
Reveals the secret key for a registered: Reveals the secret key for a registered webhook so you can verify incoming signatures.
Enables or disables a registered Sendr w: Enables or disables a registered Sendr webhook.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Select the contact list (sheet) to use.
### How to Add a Row\n1. Select the targ:
### How to Add a Row
1. Select the target sheet above.
2. Enter the row data below using column names as keys and the cell values as values.
Key-value pairs representing the new row: Key-value pairs representing the new row. Keys should match the sheet column names. Example: { "Email": "john@example.com", "First Name": "John" }
Filter campaigns by their current status: Filter campaigns by their current status.
Select a Sendr Page template to generate: Select a Sendr Page template to generate content from.
### How to Generate a Page\n1. Choose a:
### How to Generate a Page
1. Choose a **Page Template** below.
2. Fill in the variable values (e.g. first_name = "Anna", company = "Acme").
3. Optionally provide a website URL to screenshot, or enable GIF/audio rendering.
Optional. Provide a website URL if the t: Optional. Provide a website URL if the template supports background screenshots.
If enabled, Sendr will generate an anima: If enabled, Sendr will generate an animated GIF version of the page.
Optional metadata attributes for the gen: Optional metadata attributes for the generated page (key-value pairs).
Optional callback URL to receive status: Optional callback URL to receive status updates (e.g. when GIF or audio is ready).
Key-value pairs matching the template va: Key-value pairs matching the template variables. Example: { "first_name": "Anna", "company": "Acme Inc" }
Public URL of the base audio file to per: Public URL of the base audio file to personalize.
The word to find and replace in the audi: The word to find and replace in the audio (e.g. "first_name" or "[NAME]").
The word to insert in place of the targe: The word to insert in place of the target word (e.g. "Anna").
Optional ElevenLabs voice ID for the gen: Optional ElevenLabs voice ID for the generated audio.
Optional callback URL to receive status: Optional callback URL to receive status updates when the audio job is done.
Public URL of the audio track to use.
Public URL of the base video to use.
Optional Mux asset ID for the video sour: Optional Mux asset ID for the video source.
Optional Sendr Page slug to associate wi: Optional Sendr Page slug to associate with this video.
Optional callback URL to receive status: Optional callback URL to receive status updates when the video job is done.
A human-readable name for the webhook.
The endpoint URL that Sendr will call wh: The endpoint URL that Sendr will call when events occur.

Optional metadata attributes for the web: Optional metadata attributes for the webhook.
Optional resource type filter for the we: Optional resource type filter for the webhook.
Optional resource ID filter for the webh: Optional resource ID filter for the webhook.
Updated list of event names to subscribe: Updated list of event names to subscribe to.
Check to enable the webhook, uncheck to: Check to enable the webhook, uncheck to disable it.

Triggers when a Sendr Page render is upd: Triggers when a Sendr Page render is updated (e.g. GIF or audio is ready).
